commands: what should my assistant do this week

skillsCatalog.name: Botcake Ecom
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate a complete, high-converting Botcake system prompt for a Philippine eCommerce product using a COD funnel.

skillsCatalog.name: Botcake Service
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate a complete, high-converting Botcake system prompt for a Philippine service-based business. Goal is lead qualification and booking — NOT instant selling.

skillsCatalog.name: Cinematic Story Engine
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate short-form cinematic stories for TikTok, Reels, and ads that feel like mini-movies, create emotional engagement, and convert naturally by integrating Hinilas Pro as the system behind the transformation.
commands: write a cinematic episode funnel story for [offer]
make me a story-driven ad about [audience pain]
create a short-form story that sells Hinilas Pro

skillsCatalog.name: Codex Pair
skillsCatalog.purpose: Pair Claude (Opus) as planner with Codex CLI as executor. Conserves Claude tokens by routing mechanical work to Codex while keeping judgment calls (architecture, copy, design tradeoffs, debugging unclear failures) with Claude.

skillsCatalog.name: Content Calendar
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate a full month of content topics organized by funnel stage (TOF/MOF/BOF) for Ken's personal brand.

skillsCatalog.name: Content Ideas
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate a batch of content ideas for Ken's personal brand using the 5 Core Content Pillars and Idea Generation Formula.
commands: Or specify: "Give me 10 content ideas for [pillar]"

skillsCatalog.name: Content Repurpose
skillsCatalog.purpose: Take one blog post or written topic and generate all platform copy — no video needed.
commands: generate posts from this article [paste text or URL]

skillsCatalog.name: Content Script
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate a podcast-style script in Ken's voice using the Podcast Content Framework (Consultation Style).
commands: Write a script about [topic or belief to break]
"Write a script about [topic or belief to break]"

skillsCatalog.name: Credit Audit
skillsCatalog.purpose: Scan the entire web-hilas codebase and verify the credit system is correctly wired on every paid action.

skillsCatalog.name: Daily Report
skillsCatalog.purpose: Combined daily report — Pancake POS orders + Meta Ads performance + ROAS. Auto-sends to Messenger.

skillsCatalog.name: Deploy Check
skillsCatalog.purpose: Run a full pre-deploy audit on the web-hilas project. Do all steps in order.

skillsCatalog.name: Executive Assistant
skillsCatalog.purpose: Operate as Ken's executive assistant and second brain. Use this for day-to-day planning, prioritization, content coordination, task triage, follow-through, and turning vague requests into clear next actions.

skillsCatalog.name: Fb Full
skillsCatalog.purpose: Transcribe a reel video, generate FB + IG + YouTube content, schedule all 16 FB posts, and immediately publish Blog + IG Reel + IG Feed + IG Carousels (TOF/MOF/BOF) + YouTube Short. 23 pieces of content per run.
commands: # Dry run — generate only, skip scheduling

skillsCatalog.name: Fb Piblish
skillsCatalog.purpose: Publish and schedule all content from a prepped output folder — steps 5 to 10. Run this when you're ready to go live. Scheduling dates are calculated from the day you run this, not the day you prepped.

skillsCatalog.name: Fb Prep
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate all content assets from a video — steps 1 to 4 only. No posting, no scheduling, no dates locked in. Use this to prepare content in advance.
commands: # Prep all assets (transcribe + analyze + generate + images)
# Prep without image generation (faster, images generated later)

skillsCatalog.name: Hook Generator
skillsCatalog.purpose: Generate 10 scroll-stopping hook variations for a given topic in Ken's voice.

skillsCatalog.name: Meta Ads
skillsCatalog.purpose: Pull live data from Ken's Meta Ads account via the Marketing API and display campaign performance metrics.

commands: Provide: route name, credit cost (0 = free), what it does.

skillsCatalog.purpose: Scaffold a new module page for web-hilas with the standard layout.
commands: Provide: page name, route, what it does, credit cost.

skillsCatalog.purpose: Upload content engine output to Dropbox and log the 7-day posting schedule to Google Sheets.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Admin
skillsCatalog.purpose: Drop a complete owner-only admin dashboard into any Next.js + Supabase SaaS project.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Ai Module
skillsCatalog.purpose: Scaffold one complete AI module for any Next.js + Supabase + Gemini SaaS project.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Auth Supabase
skillsCatalog.purpose: Set up complete Supabase Google OAuth authentication for a new Next.js project.
commands: No arguments needed. Run at project start after `saas-init`.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Credit System
skillsCatalog.purpose: Drop a complete credit system into any existing Next.js + Supabase project.
commands: Provide: credit costs per action, signup credits amount.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Feedback
skillsCatalog.purpose: Drop a complete user feedback system into any Next.js + Supabase SaaS project.
commands: No arguments needed. Just run it and it adds everything.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Init
skillsCatalog.purpose: Bootstrap a full SaaS foundation for a new Next.js + Supabase project. Run this at the start of every new tool build.
commands: Provide: app name, what it does, currency (default PHP).
Example: `saas-init — AdTracker — track ad spend and ROAS — PHP`

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Payments Gcash
skillsCatalog.purpose: Add a manual GCash top-up payment flow to any Next.js + Supabase SaaS project.

skillsCatalog.name: Saas Referral
skillsCatalog.purpose: Add a complete referral system to any Next.js + Supabase SaaS project.
commands: Provide: reward credits for referrer, reward credits for new user (if any).

skillsCatalog.name: Veo Prompting
skillsCatalog.purpose: Create short-form cinematic Veo prompts for TikTok, Reels, and Meta Ads. Use this when Ken wants story-driven video prompts that feel like a mini-movie, maintain retention, and still lead toward conversion.
commands: veo-prompting: make me a cinematic ad sequence for [offer]
write Veo prompts for this product
turn this offer into a cinematic episode sequence
"veo-prompting: make me a cinematic ad sequence for [offer]"

skillsCatalog.name: Video Analysis
skillsCatalog.purpose: Deep framework analysis of a video file using OpenAI. Whisper transcribes the audio, GPT-4o analyzes it against Ken's Podcast Content Framework and 5 Content Pillars.
commands: Analyze this video: [path to video file]
Claude will run the Python script and return the full analysis.

skillsCatalog.name: Web Builder
skillsCatalog.purpose: Build, redesign, repair, or extend websites and frontend apps in this workspace. Use this skill when Ken says "web builder", asks to build a website, change an existing site, create a page, improve a UI, fix responsive layout, wire frontend behavior, or prepare a site for local testing/deploy.
commands: Provide the target site if known, plus the goal.
`web-builder - update kuya-ken-portfolio homepage to look more premium`
`web-builder - build a landing page for an automation offer`
`web-builder - fix mobile checkout layout in saiko_web`
`web-builder - add a pricing page to web-hilas`

activityFeed.title: Mark OS build phase as complete and add full cadence coverage from daily to quarterly.
activityFeed.detail: The system now has command center routing, weekly controls, dashboard refresh loops, revenue pipeline tracking, and governance SOPs across weekly/monthly/quarterly cycles.

activityFeed.title: Add automation-offer and lead-pipeline execution cadence as a tracked weekly revenue system.
activityFeed.detail: Offer and lead docs existed, but execution was not enforced with daily actions, stage movement, and weekly conversion tracking.

activityFeed.title: Add a CEO dashboard execution layer as a weekly operating requirement.
activityFeed.detail: A dashboard doc existed, but there was no enforced refresh workflow tied to weekly review and decision-making cadence.

activityFeed.title: Add explicit project-state governance with an active-work registry.
activityFeed.detail: Weekly priorities improved, but active vs parked work was still implicit and caused routing drift risk.

activityFeed.title: Add a formal priority-refresh workflow with weekly history snapshots.
activityFeed.detail: Weekly execution was defined, but there was no standardized handoff between old and new weeks.

activityFeed.title: Use weekly review as the control rhythm for the operating system.
activityFeed.detail: The system already has execution tools, but needs a recurring cadence to keep priorities, decisions, SOPs, and active projects current.

activityFeed.title: Top Priority 1
activityFeed.detail: Build the operating layer: command center, SOPs, weekly review, and dashboards.

activityFeed.title: Top Priority 2
activityFeed.detail: Keep content production aligned with active revenue and offer priorities.

activityFeed.title: Top Priority 3
activityFeed.detail: Turn automation work into a repeatable service offer and lead pipeline.
